name: Ten Shadows Technique (Tokusa no Kage Bōjutsu)

requirements.note: Inherited from Zenin bloodline. Summons shikigami via shadows.

abilities.name: Divine Dogs
abilities.description: Twin wolf shikigami for tracking and combat.

mechanics.special_effect: High-speed pursuit. If one falls, unlocks Divine Dog: Totality.

abilities.name: Divine Dog: Totality
abilities.description: Fused ultimate wolf after one Divine Dog is defeated.

mechanics.special_effect: Massively enhanced speed, strength, and tracking. Replaces base form.

abilities.name: Nue
abilities.description: Giant bird shikigami with electrokinetic wings.

mechanics.special_effect: Aerial mobility, wing dives, electric shocks. Combines with Toad for extensions.

abilities.name: Great Serpent
abilities.description: Massive snake for constriction and ambush.

mechanics.special_effect: Crushing coils and surprise strikes from shadows.

abilities.name: Toad
abilities.description: Amphibious shikigami for support and grabs.

mechanics.special_effect: Tongue lashes for pulling enemies/allies. Combines with Nue for winged toad swarm.

abilities.name: Well's Unknown Abyss
abilities.description: Extension summoning winged toads via Toad + Nue fusion.

mechanics.special_effect: Numerous winged toads for aerial support. Destroying them does NOT consume base Toad/Nue.
Torrential water blasts for crowd control and flooding.

abilities.name: Rabbit Escape
abilities.description: Swarm of rabbits for distraction or escape.

mechanics.special_effect: Overwhelm foes with numbers. Ideal for fleeing or creating openings.

abilities.name: Mahoraga
abilities.description: Ultimate shikigami general. Most powerful. Untameable by default.

mechanics.special_effect: Untamed: paralyzes user, attacks everything indiscriminately. Tame via gameplay event (see events.json tame_mahoraga) → full control + adapts to any phenomenon.

domain_expansion.name: Chimera Shadow Garden
domain_expansion.description: Incomplete domain flooding area with shadows. Produces endless shikigami and user clones. No barrier — must overlap indoor space.

mechanics.special_effect: 120% Ten Shadows potential. Infinite shikigami clones. Indoor-only.
